reviews.review_description: I'm a moderator and beta-tester the game is really good I recommend you try it out it's a fun game and we do not permit toxicity here so be nice to each other. (Orbvr_0215 btw 😁)

So I was in a game and the creator said if I wanted moderater so I said yes but he never gave me mod he is a liar and this is a message to the creator you blocked me for no reason and never gave me mod you suck

developer_response.body:
Uhm sorry that I told you that you wil get mod but when did that happen? Like I really do not remember telling you that you will get mod or something like that. And who are you that I blocked? Are you pig-E because if yes then I have a big reason for blocking you. You were non stop sending discord server invite links. I even said stop I will NOT join. But if you are not that guy/girl/idk what then I do not know but you can join the discord to talk this out. Plus telling me that I suck will not help you will just make it worse.

-TMTime :)

reviews.review_title: Horrible I can make a better game TBH

developer_response.body: Sorry about like the hacker and stuff, but the mic was part of a prank update.
